message:
fix(openai): use character count instead of byte length for embedding input limit

Change 4096-character limit check from text.len() (byte count) to
text.chars().count() (character count). Prevents false rejections of
multi-byte UTF-8 text that is under 4096 characters but over 4096 bytes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
